## What this changes
A short description of the change.

## Why
The problem it solves or the feature it adds.

## If you updated X selectors
- [ ] The change is contained in the `CONFIG` block (or the fragile extraction layer)
- [ ] I left the stable core engine (fetch → base64 → assemble → download) untouched
- Which selector(s) changed and why:

## Testing
- [ ] Installed the modified `sourcecapsule.user.js` locally
- [ ] Exported a real Article and/or post
- [ ] Opened the result **offline** (DevTools → Network → "Offline") and confirmed
      images load and quoted tweets render
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` pass

## Originality
- [ ] This code is original and does not copy from any proprietary userscript or
      extension. Any technique adapted from another open-source project is credited
      in a comment with its license noted.
